category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes tmpmail as temporary email written in POSIX sh.
source_facts.description says tmpmail provides temporary email from the terminal.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is sdushantha/tmpmail.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README provides dependencies, installation, and usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/sdushantha/tmpmail; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists command-line dependencies and installation.
source_facts.description supports temporary-email, terminal, and POSIX shell tags.
